name: bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_fuel_tile_audit_mcw
description: Focused continuation behind the now-green deploy primitive recipe: start from exact live-accessible brazier/2x4/lighter fixture, prove Apply->brazier->Deploy where?->east with harness UI trace, then drop exact 2x4 fuel onto the resulting brazier, prove uppercase-Y save/writeback, and require saved current-tile f_brazier plus 2x4 metadata. This is fuel primitive proof only, not final fd_fire proof.

steps.label: exact_items_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact-items McWilliams fixture is loaded on the map before any deploy/drop/lighter macro runs.

steps.label: audit_saved_inventory_has_exact_fire_items
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved player live-accessible carried/worn inventory contains the exact brazier, 2x4 fuel, and lighter fixture items before any GUI deploy/drop/lighter macro is trusted
steps.next_step_gate: do not credit any GUI deploy/drop/lighter step if the exact fixture items are missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory
steps.abort_reason: exact fire fixture items missing from live-accessible saved-player inventory before player-action fuel primitive audit

steps.label: open_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Apply key is sent; the following harness UI trace gate must prove the Use item inventory opened before another unsafe key fires.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_apply_inventory_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the Use item inventory opened
steps.next_step_gate: do not type inventory filter keys unless the Use item inventory-open trace is present
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove the Use item inventory opened before filtering

steps.label: filter_apply_inventory_for_brazier_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filter key is sent only after the Use item inventory-open trace is green; OCR is secondary discovery evidence only.

steps.label: type_brazier_filter_for_apply_text_guard
steps.expected_visible_fact: The brazier filter text is submitted only after the Apply inventory-open trace is green.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_filtered_brazier_selected
required_patterns: openclaw_harness_ui_trace: component=inventory_selector event=state title="Use item" filter="brazier" action="redraw" selection_method="highlight_after_redraw"
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace after redraw proves the Apply inventory filter is brazier and the highlighted row is the brazier item
steps.preconditions: the Use item inventory is open and the brazier filter text was typed.
steps.next_step_gate: do not press confirm unless the highlighted filtered row is proven as brazier
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove filtered highlighted item was brazier before confirm

steps.label: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt
steps.expected_visible_fact: The filtered inventory row is confirmed; following harness UI trace gates must prove the returned item is brazier and Deploy where? opened.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_brazier_selected_and_deploy_prompt_open
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves the selector returned brazier and opened Deploy where?
steps.preconditions: select_filtered_brazier_expect_deploy_prompt confirmed the filtered Apply inventory row.
steps.next_step_gate: do not send right/east unless the returned item is brazier and the Deploy where? prompt is open
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove selected brazier plus Deploy where? before right/east

steps.label: place_prompted_brazier_east
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Deploy where? prompt accepts right/east and returns to the map.

steps.label: audit_ui_trace_deploy_prompt_consumed_right
steps.expected_visible_fact: harness-gated UI trace proves right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? direction prompt
steps.next_step_gate: do not step/drop/save/audit the brazier tile unless right/east was consumed by the Deploy where? prompt
steps.abort_reason: harness UI trace did not prove right/east was consumed by Deploy where?

steps.label: step_onto_prompted_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The player steps east onto the UI-trace-proven brazier tile before dropping fuel.

steps.label: drop_exact_2x4_on_prompted_brazier
steps.expected_visible_fact: The exact 2x4 fuel drop route resolves on the current brazier tile.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_before_post_fuel_save
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime baseline is recorded after fuel drop and before the post-fuel save is requested

steps.label: request_save_after_fuel_drop
steps.abort_reason: screen text did not prove the Save and quit prompt existed before confirming the post-fuel save
steps.expected_visible_fact: A post-fuel Save and quit prompt is requested after dropping fuel; confirmation must not be sent before this prompt is proven.

steps.label: confirm_save_after_fuel_drop
steps.failure_rule: the uppercase-Y confirmation is only trusted if the following saved-player mtime gate proves same-run post-fuel writeback
steps.next_step_gate: feature proof may proceed only when audit_player_save_mtime_after_post_fuel_save is green
steps.expected_visible_fact: The source-backed Save and quit request is confirmed with uppercase Y; this row is not closure by itself, and the following mtime plus saved-map metadata gates decide whether same-run fuel writeback actually happened.

steps.label: audit_player_save_mtime_after_post_fuel_save
steps.abort_reason: saved-player file mtime did not advance after the post-fuel save confirmation
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved-player file mtime advanced after the confirmed post-fuel save, proving the following saved-map audit reads same-run state

steps.label: audit_saved_current_tile_for_brazier_fuel
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved current tile contains f_brazier furniture and 2x4 fuel metadata after the drop step
steps.preconditions: post-fuel uppercase-Y save wrote a same-run save while the player stands on the brazier/fuel tile
steps.next_step_gate: do not run or credit lighter/fire proof unless this fuel metadata row is green
steps.abort_reason: brazier/fuel metadata missing before lighter/fire steps

recommended_test_command: python3 tools/openclaw_harness/startup_harness.py probe bandit.live_world_nearby_camp_real_fire_exact_items_fuel_tile_audit_mcw (deploy UI trace + fuel drop/uppercase-Y save mtime gate only; not final fd_fire proof)
